name: Micro Lemon Meringue Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix sugar and cornstarch thoroughly in a 1 quart glass measuring bowl.
2. Stir in water. Cook in micro for 2 1/2 minutes at high.
3. Stir continuously until thick, stirring after 30 seconds.
4. Beat a small amount of hot mixture into egg yolks or egg beaters, then add to the mixture in the glass measuring bowl.
5. Cook in micro for 30 seconds on high.
6. Blend butter or butter buds, lemon juice, and lemon peel into the mixture in the glass measuring bowl.
7. Cool, pour into baked pie shell. Cover with meringue and brown top under broiler in oven for a few minutes.
